selected_loop_metrics.name: v7_source_exposed_prompt_diagnostic
selected_loop_metrics.cause: No fully unused source projects remained, so v7 could not honestly be strict held-out validation.
selected_loop_metrics.result: Prompt-fresh diagnostic reached EDD 97.41, but qv7_006 showed a high-score answer with too much detail after refusal.
selected_loop_metrics.insight: Saturated metrics still need human answer-quality review, especially for sensitive or unsupported-result prompts.

selected_loop_metrics.name: v7_source_exposed_topk8_control_shard
selected_loop_metrics.cause: The current topk8 control was rerun as a shard after L84 timeout.
selected_loop_metrics.result: After L86 measurement correction, topk8 had clean quality gates, best EDD among v7 shards, and max latency 23.46s.
selected_loop_metrics.insight: This is source-exposed stability and runtime evidence, not fresh validation or a new setting.

selected_loop_metrics.name: v7_source_exposed_hint_regression
selected_loop_metrics.cause: L89 fixed qv7_009 in one case, but needed a broader source-exposed regression check.
selected_loop_metrics.result: Full v7 diagnostic stayed 5/5 with abstention 1.0 and no quality issues; qv7_009 stayed concise at 718 chars and 5 bullets.
selected_loop_metrics.insight: The hint is a guarded quality candidate, not a fresh validation or speed win.

selected_loop_metrics.name: sensitive_preempt_v7_regression
selected_loop_metrics.cause: The two-case preempt speed win needed a full v7 source-exposed regression check.
selected_loop_metrics.result: Full v7 reached EDD 98.54, latency 14.44s, abstention 1.0, quality issue rows 0/12; qv7_006 and qv7_012 preempted to sub-second latencies.
selected_loop_metrics.insight: This is the strongest source-exposed diagnostic row, but still not fresh validation.
